message.tacz_sewv.heli.no_pad: Look at a block to land on.
message.tacz_sewv.board.no_vehicle: Look at a vehicle or mortar.
message.tacz_sewv.escort.select: Left-click a vehicle to escort, right-click to cancel.
message.tacz_sewv.escort.no_vehicle: That's not a vehicle. Left-click a vehicle, or right-click to cancel.
message.tacz_sewv.escort.no_units: No units selected or nearby to escort.
message.tacz_sewv.cruise.plotting: Left-click to add a waypoint, right-click to remove. %s plotted.
message.tacz_sewv.map.ordered: %s unit(s) moving to the marked position.
message.tacz_sewv.map.wrong_dimension: That position is in another dimension.
message.tacz_sewv.mortar.ordered.none: No free units to crew it.
message.tacz_sewv.mortar.taken: That mortar already has a crew.
message.tacz_sewv.mortar.gone: That mortar is no longer there.
gui.tacz_sewv.tdt.title: Tactical Data Terminal
gui.tacz_sewv.tdt.board_passenger.tip: Board the vehicle you are looking at, but only into non-driver seats. Units wait beside an empty hull rather than taking the wheel.
gui.tacz_sewv.tdt.escort.tip: Select your units in the commander menu first, then press this and left-click a vehicle for them to stick beside and defend. Right-click cancels the selection.
gui.tacz_sewv.tdt.patrol.tip: Radius of the patrol area around you in blocks. Crews wander inside it moving to a new spot after a bit, until you dismiss them. Minimum 48.
gui.tacz_sewv.tdt.dismiss.tip: Stand crews down off Patrol, Search & Destroy or a plotted Cruise and return them to their normal behavior. They stay in their vehicles.
gui.tacz_sewv.tdt.search.tip: Radius of the area to sweep, in blocks. A one-time assignment: each vehicle covers its own slice of the area, and the first contact alerts every vehicle on the task onto that target. Minimum 48.
gui.tacz_sewv.tdt.altitude.tip: Cruise altitude held above the terrain in blocks. Press Takeoff again to retrim a helicopter that is already flying.
gui.tacz_sewv.tdt.line.tip: Vehicles per rank in a Line formation. Once a rank is full the next vehicle starts a new rank behind it.
message.tacz_sewv.patrol.min_radius: Patrol radius must be at least %s blocks.
message.tacz_sewv.dismiss.none: No crews on an area task.
tooltip.tacz_sewv.handheld_radio.use: Use on a target: call a fire mission from your mortar and TOW crews
tooltip.tacz_sewv.handheld_radio.standdo: Sneak + use: call your crews off
tooltip.tacz_sewv.handheld_radio.unit: Carried by a unit: it calls in its own contacts
message.tacz_sewv.radio.no_target: Nothing in your sights to call a mission on.
message.tacz_sewv.radio.no_crews: No mortar or TOW crews in radio range.
message.tacz_sewv.radio.standdown.none: No crews on a fire mission.
command.tacz_sewv.spawn.fail: Couldn't spawn the vehicle: no space here, no valid vehicle id in the config pool, or SuperbWarfare isn't loaded.
command.tacz_sewv.spawn.support_fail: Couldn't spawn the unit: no space here, or SuperbWarfare isn't loaded.
command.tacz_sewv.spawn.emplacement_fail: Couldn't spawn the emplacement: no space here, or SuperbWarfare isn't loaded.
command.tacz_sewv.spawn.not_in_pool: "%s" is not in the %s vehicle pool. add it to the config or pick one of the pool's ids.
message.tacz_sewv.tdt.no_terminal: Carry a Tactical Data Terminal to use this.
tooltip.tacz_sewv.tactical_data_terminal: Also opens with the Open Tactical Data Terminal key (default G) — works even while seated in a vehicle
command.tacz_sewv.status.player_only: Only a player can check their own units' status.
command.tacz_sewv.status.none_owned: You have no owned units nearby.
